frame_beat: The tree goblin faces south in a strong anticipation pose, both hands/claws gripping its own head, shoulders hunched, knees bent, head still attached but visibly being twisted loose.
notes: Frame 01 approved from the mapped south base source.

frame_beat: The head is pulled free from the neck; arms lift it forward and upward, neck stump readable but non-gory, body leaning back from the effort.
notes: Frame 02 approved after user clarified blood/gore is allowed; current selected frame uses a hollow wooden neck and passes active gates.

frame_beat: Throw release; torso snaps forward, arms extend in a south-facing throwing motion, detached head just leaving the hands with clear separation and empty space around the motion.
notes: Frame 03 approved after one rejected attempt; release beat is readable and padded.

frame_beat: No head in the picture; the head is offscreen after the throw, while the headless body follows through and begins preparing to receive it.
notes: Redo frame 04 approved from frame 03. No head is visible.

frame_beat: Catch; both hands catch and hold the returning head near the neck, body braced and weight lowered.
notes: Redo frame 05 approved. Head is caught in hands near the neck.

frame_beat: Put head back on; the head is seated back on the body, hands press/release it into place, posture returns toward a readable south-facing stance with a small settling motion.
notes: Redo frame 06 approved. Head is attached/back on.
